message:
fix: move Gemini callId state to instance level (memory leak, concurrency)

callIdCounter and callIdToName were module-level globals shared across all
GeminiAdapter instances. This caused a memory leak (callIdToName grew
forever), concurrency hazards, and cross-instance contamination. Move both
to instance properties and thread them through helper functions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
